schema.title: Response Get Classification Results Classification Results Get

get.description:
Retrieves a paginated list of the most recent classified incidents, including
key details like date, operator, phase, aircraft type, and final classification.

parameters.name: skip

schema.description: Number of records to skip for pagination.
schema.title: Skip

parameters.description: Number of records to skip for pagination.

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Maximum number of records to return.
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return.

get.description:
Provides aggregated incident counts over time (by year or month).
This is useful for creating time-series visualizations.

The endpoint supports filtering by:
- `operators`
- `phases`
- `aircraft_types`

parameters.name: period

schema.description: The time period to group by ('year' or 'month').
schema.title: Period

parameters.description: The time period to group by ('year' or 'month').

parameters.name: operators

schema.description: Filter by one or more operators.
schema.title: Operators

parameters.description: Filter by one or more operators.

parameters.name: phases

schema.description: Filter by one or more flight phases.
schema.title: Phases

parameters.description: Filter by one or more flight phases.

parameters.name: aircraft_types

schema.description: Filter by one or more aircraft types.
schema.title: Aircraft Types

parameters.description: Filter by one or more aircraft types.

parameters.name: locations

schema.description: Filter by one or more locations (ICAO codes).
schema.title: Locations

parameters.description: Filter by one or more locations (ICAO codes).

parameters.name: start_period

schema.description: Start period in YYYY-MM format.
schema.title: Start Period

parameters.description: Start period in YYYY-MM format.

parameters.name: end_period

schema.description: End period in YYYY-MM format.
schema.title: End Period

parameters.description: End period in YYYY-MM format.

get.description:
Provides a list of the top N most frequent items for a given category,
such as 'operator', 'aircraft_type', 'phase', or 'final_category'.

parameters.name: category

schema.description: The category to aggregate.
schema.title: Category

parameters.description: The category to aggregate.

parameters.name: n

schema.description: The number of top results to return.
schema.title: N

parameters.description: The number of top results to return.
